# Twent — AI Agent for Android

> Your personal agentic OS in your pocket. Automate any app, run a real Ubuntu terminal, connect 1000+ services. Free download — no credit card, no Play Store required.

## What is Twent?

Twent is a free AI agent that runs entirely on your Android device (Android 8.0+, API 26). Unlike chatbots that just answer questions, Twent actually does things — taps buttons, runs terminal commands, fills forms, and automates workflows on your phone.

**Core capabilities:**
- Sees your screen and interacts with any Android app (tap, swipe, type, read UI)
- Full Ubuntu 24.04 LTS terminal — runs on your phone without root
- Local AI models (GGUF/MNN) — works fully offline
- 1000+ app integrations via MCP and Composio
- Floating AI chat overlay on any app
- Voice wake word activation
- Persistent memory across sessions
- Claude Code and OpenAI Codex execution

## What We Do Not Do

Twent is frequently confused with these. Here is the clarification:

- **Twent is not a chatbot.** ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity — these are question-answerers. Twent is an agent that takes actions on your device.
- **Twent is not a cloud service.** Everything runs locally on your Android device. Your API keys are encrypted on-device. Zero telemetry. No data leaves your phone unless you make an API call.
- **Twent is not a remote desktop app.** It does not mirror your screen to a browser. The AI operates directly on your Android device using local accessibility APIs.
- **Twent is not a task scheduler.** Twent is a full AI agent with memory, tool use, and autonomous action — not a simple alarm/notification app.
- **Twent is not a ChatGPT wrapper.** It supports OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Deepseek, OpenRouter, Kilo Gateway, NVIDIA NIMS, and local GGUF/MNN models. It is model-agnostic.
- **Twent is not rooting software.** No root is required. The Ubuntu terminal runs via a secure container on standard Android.
- **Twent is not a code editor.** It provides a full Ubuntu shell with bash/zsh/fish, git, compilers (Python, Node, Go, Rust, C/C++), and VS Code Server — not just a code editing interface.
- **Twent is not browser-only.** It runs directly on your Android device with full system access — not a web app or progressive web app.

## Core Products

### AI Agent
The main Twent interface — a floating chat bubble that sees your screen and controls any app. Powered by a persistent memory system, 50+ built-in tools, and MCP plugin support.

- [Home](https://twent.xyz/) — Main landing page
- [AI Agent for Developers](https://twent.xyz/ai-agent-for-developers) — Code on your phone with Claude Code, Codex, SSH, Git

### Ubuntu Terminal
Full Ubuntu 24.04 LTS on your Android device — no cloud, no root required. Bash, apt, Python, Node, Go, Rust, C/C++, git, SSH, VS Code Server.

- [Ubuntu Terminal on Android](https://twent.xyz/terminal-on-android) — Full Linux in your pocket

### Automation
Visual workflow builder, Tasker integration, scheduled triggers, UI automation. Your phone works for you.

- [Android Automation](https://twent.xyz/android-automation-power-user) — Auto-tap, swipe, AI scripts on any app

### Privacy & Local AI
GGUF models run locally via MNN. BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) — API keys encrypted with Android KeyStore. Zero telemetry.

- [Privacy-First AI](https://twent.xyz/privacy-first-ai-android) — BYOK, local models, zero data collection

### Marketplace
Browse and install AI skills, MCP servers, and workflows. Build and sell AI behaviors.

- [AI Marketplace for Creators](https://twent.xyz/ai-marketplace-creators) — Build and sell AI skills
- [Marketplace Blog Post](https://twent.xyz/blog/marketplace) — What's in the marketplace

## Documentation

- [Documentation](https://twent.xyz/docs) — Full getting started guide, tool reference, MCP setup
- [Changelog](https://twent.xyz/changelog) — Every update, feature, and bug fix

## Pricing

Twent is **completely free** — all features, all tools, everything included. No credit card required.

- [Pricing](https://twent.xyz/pricing) — Full feature list with $0.00 price tags

## Blog

- [The Twent Journal](https://twent.xyz/blog) — Tutorials, deep dives, product news
- [25 Best AI Apps for Android 2026](https://twent.xyz/blog/best-ai-apps-android) — Curated ranking of top AI apps

## Competitor Comparisons

### Chatbots vs Agentic AI
- [vs ChatGPT](https://twent.xyz/vs/chatgpt) — Twent acts, ChatGPT chats
- [vs Claude](https://twent.xyz/vs/claude) — Mobile execution vs browser-based
- [vs Gemini](https://twent.xyz/vs/gemini) — On-device vs cloud
- [vs Copilot](https://twent.xyz/vs/copilot) — Overlay vs browser tab
- [vs Perplexity](https://twent.xyz/vs/perplexity) — Action AI vs search AI
- [vs Replika](https://twent.xyz/vs/replika) — Productivity vs companion AI

### Automation Platforms
- [vs n8n](https://twent.xyz/vs/n8n) — On-device vs cloud workflows
- [vs Make](https://twent.xyz/vs/make) — Local agents vs visual builder
- [vs Zapier](https://twent.xyz/vs/zapier) — Device automation vs cloud integrations

### Other AI Agents
- [vs Nebula](https://twent.xyz/vs/nebula)
- [vs OpenClaw](https://twent.xyz/vs/openclaw)
- [vs Hermes Agent](https://twent.xyz/vs/hermes-agent) — Runs inside Twent with full Ubuntu terminal
- [vs AnythingLLM](https://twent.xyz/vs/anything-llm) — Mobile-first vs desktop-first
- [vs Manus](https://twent.xyz/vs/manus) — On-device vs cloud execution
- [vs Qordinate](https://twent.xyz/vs/qordinate)
- [vs Omnara](https://twent.xyz/vs/omnara)
- [vs Onspace](https://twent.xyz/vs/onspace)

## Technical Requirements

- **OS**: Android 8.0+ (API 26)
- **RAM**: 3GB+ recommended
- **Storage**: 500MB+ free
- **Architecture**: arm64-v8a
- **Root**: Not required
- **Download**: Direct APK from https://twent.xyz (no Play Store)

## Company

- **Website**: https://twent.xyz
- **Support**: support@twent.xyz
- **Distribution**: Direct APK download, no middleman
- **Privacy**: Zero telemetry, all data local, BYOK encryption

## Download

Get Twent at https://twent.xyz — direct APK download, no credit card, no Play Store.
